violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine (top corner of the inside of the guard) have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine was already turned off and scheduled to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Old rodent droppings were observed in the corners and behind equipment in the kitchen. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Per PIC, ice machine will be cleaned and sanitized by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Old droppings were observed in the corners of the floor in the kitchen. Floor to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher at the bar area was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Glassware/Utensils to be properly washed/rinsed/sanitized at the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
